tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing Delay Impact on Commitments

payload.claim_text: Due to the risk of ongoing litigation delaying congestion pricing funding the MTA plans to commit $2.9 billion worth of capital projects in 2024. Some commitments will continue to stall until congestion pricing can be secured.
payload.description: Ongoing litigation delaying congestion pricing affecting MTA capital commitments

tool_args.label: Fare Array Pilot at Sutphin Boulevard

payload.claim_text: MTA C&D piloted a new fare array at Sutphin Boulevard which is also ADA-compliant. Fare collection has already increased by 20% since the installation.
payload.description: Fare array pilot at Sutphin Boulevard with 20% increase in fare collection

payload.claim_text: 70% of full-fare riders who have access to OMNY are now using OMNY
payload.description: OMNY contactless fare payment adoption rate across the system

payload.claim_text: 41 subway stations are currently in construction to become ADA accessible, and 25 have been made accessible since 2020
payload.description: MTA C&D continued historic investment in ADA accessibility for subway stations

payload.claim_text: over 75% of full-service Metro North Railroad stations are ADA accessible, and 80% will be accessible by the end of the year
payload.description: Metro-North Railroad station ADA accessible status

payload.claim_text: By applying lessons from Phase 1, like early relocation of utilities, MTA C&D identified $1 billion dollars in savings, plus at least $300 million more coming, all while delivering high quality transit improvements for riders in East Harlem
payload.description: Savings identified for Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 through lessons from Phase 1
